en-GB.title: Text Capsule
en-GB.subtitle: Messages to your future self
en-GB.description:
Send a message to your future self and receive it in 6 months or a year via SMS or WhatsApp.

Text Capsule lets you write letters, set goals, send encouragement, and capture memories — then delivers them back to you when the time comes.

Features:
• Write messages with creative writing prompts
• Choose delivery in 6 months or 1 year
• Receive via SMS or WhatsApp
• View your message history
• Simple, beautiful chat-style interface

Write today. Receive tomorrow.
